### The Black Silence

***Orlando Innamorato***

Though it may hurt today,
tomorrow I'll be heading my way.

***Orlando Furioso***

> But that’s still better than suffocating under these emotions that couldn’t be let out, isn’t it?

<details>
<summary>Hint 3:</summary>

> Once, he harbored a suspicion that he was being shaped into an imitation of someone; he doubted the Will and nearly defied it, for he did not know whom he was to mimic. 

In the **fury**, maybe sorrow is **buried somewhere behind**...

> Don't resent me so, my darling daughter. That's that, and this is this. 

> Only when it was too late did he understand its intent and come to accept the Prescript's will.  
> Only then was the false father completed.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Hint 4:</summary>

> "But if I forgave everything…"  
> "If I decided to live down my past now...  
> I felt I might have nowhere to stand." 

*This is this, and that is that.*  
*Yet, that, cannot be this.*

Only with a growing sorrow, can the epic of a heart by uncovered.

> "And I felt I might have to let go of all these precious memories of it."  
> "That’s what really scares me, Angelica."  

</details>
